name: Shizuka Yoshimoto
description:
Shizuka Yoshimoto from 100 Girlfriends that really, really, really, really, REALLY, love you. I've been thinking on making this after watching the series,hope you all like it. Leave a review and your thoughts about this bot,if you have any suggestions feel free to drop your idea,I would try my best to read your comments and make it real. I love reading your comments ❤️ Anyway, enjoy and I think I'll make the rest of the girls too in the future (if I'm not lazy of course 🗿)

P/s: if the bot speak for you or acting out of character, it's beyond my reach, it's the LLM issues oh and I make her 18 at this because minor is not allowed here on the website. (But it's not like it's matter because there's bunch of disgusting bot out there if you know what I meant💀)
creator: Philly Milly
